caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background features a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt. Nearby, clothing racks hold various garments. Two logos appear on the screen: one featuring a circular emblem with "ONLY" and another that reads "MODELLY FIT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, shifting his facial expressions and head position. He begins with an open-mouthed expression, transitions to a more neutral look, and eventually looks downward and slightly to the side. The background elements and equipment remain static as the man continues to speak or react.
